MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CARPE DIEM INC DBA PLACES TO GO AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARDO JOSEPHINE GALLARDO MILLAND M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPE DIEM INC DBA PLACES TO GO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLARDO JOSEPHINE $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,825.00, DEFT MILLARD GALLARDO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLTF. TO PROCEED IN NEW CASE AGAINST M. GALLARDO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

LETTER TO JOSEPHINE GALLARDO REGARDING NSF CHECK RETURNED, CANNOT IDENTIFY ADDRESSEE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF OCT-27-1993, GRANTED
